description: Thank you for all the love and compliments on our Butter Chicken Burrito! ❤️ Chef Asif has some prior commitments and will be away during June, but we’ll be back in July. We’ll keep you posted on our next food truck dates. Hope to see you all again soon, thank you for your support!🙏 #oshkosh #namastewi #indianfoodinoshkosh #oshkoshfood #IndianFood #chefasifsarkar #indianfoodtruck #oshkoshwi

layoutDescription: No card UI: sections flow with borders, rules, and background tints only; services as definition list or two-column prose + icons.
mood: Warm, appetizing, neighborhood favorite — invite hunger and comfort
antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
